upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pravivekakAmatvAdudyAnapuzkariRyAstIre… maDukaragaRopakUjite paryaNkaRe nizaRRasya' (avadA॰jA॰2) pravivekakAmatvAt=viviktasevanecCukatvAt
'sa taM gfhijanasaMsargaM pravivekasuKapramATina vyAsaNgavikzepAntarAyakaramabahumanyamAnaH (avadA॰jA॰7) ukto'rTaH
'praviviktAM tataH kakzyAmAsasAda purARavit' (rA॰2.16.1) praviviktAm=janAsambADAm janasammardarahitAm janODena viviktAM parityaktAm
'aTApavinakti' (Sa॰brA॰1.1.4.22) iti
'vAyurvo vivinaktu' (vA॰saM॰1.16) ityasya mantrasya brAhmaRam vyaktaM brAhmaRasTo'paSabdaH SrOtasya verarTe pfTak karotItyevArTaH
'vAyurvo vivinaktu' (vA0 saM0 116) yuzmAnsUkzmakaReByaH pfTak karotvityAha
'(marutaH) pravepayanti parvatAn viviYcanti vanaspatIn' (f0 1395) viviYcanti pfTak kurvanti
'yUyaM (taRqulAH) vicyaDvaM yajYiyAsastuzEH' (aTarva0 11112) tuzEH pfTagBavatetyarTaH
'SreyaSca preyaSca vivinakti DIraH' (kaWa0 u0 22) vicintya tayorBedaM karoti
'vivinacmi divaH surAn' (Bawwi0 636) pfTak karomi pracyAvayAmi divizado diva utsArayAmItyAha
'karmaRAM ca vivekArTaM DarmADarmO vyavecayat' (manu0 126) karmaRAM viBAgAya DarmADarmO pfTaktvenAByaDAdityAha
'svalpena Kalu kAlena viviktaM pfTivItalam Bavizyati narendrOGEH SataSo vinipAtitEH' (hari0 24162).. viviktaM SUnyaM virahitaM viDuram
'viviktamarTEraBigamya madgfham' (avahA0 avizahya0 jA0 7) ukto'rTaH
'viviktadeSasevitvamaratirjanasaMsadi' (gItA 1310) vivikto vijanaH
'yaTA viviktaM yadvastraM gfhRImo yuktisaMBavAt' (BA0 pu0 11229) viviktam anitarasADAraRam itarErasAmAnyam asADAraRam vilakzaRam
'vedavitsu viviktezu pretya svargaM samaSnute' (manu0 116) DanAni pratipAdayedityanuzaNgaH viviktezu putrakalatrAdyavasaktezu (kullUkaH) viviktO pUtavijanAvityamaraH
'jYAto'yaM jalaDara tAvako vivekaH' (BAminI0 196) vivekaH sadasadviBedakarI budDiH
'vivekaBrazwAnAM Bavati vinipAtaH SatamuKaH' (Bartf0 210)
're Kala tava Kalu caritaM viduzAmagre vivicya vakzyAmi' (BAminI0 1108) vivicya sampraDArya
'aTa sa mahAtmA taM rAjAnaM dizwikftakApaTAd vivecya' (avadA0 jA0 23) vivecya pfTak kutvA
'ahamapyevamevEtaccikIrzAmi yaTA yuvAm vivektuM nAhamicCAmi tvAkAraM viduraM prati' (BA0 Adi0 2011).. vivektuM vyaktIkartum
'pratyagramajjanaviSezaviviktakAntiH' (ratnA0 120) viviktA SudDA viviktO pUtavijanAvityamaraH
